value.found_quote:
## Asynchronous execution model

To maximize developer velocity, Antigravity CLI leverages a multi-threaded asynchronous execution architecture.
value.rationale: The page, hosted on Google's antigravity.google domain, explicitly describes an "Asynchronous execution model" section for the Antigravity CLI, detailing its multi-threaded asynchronous execution architecture. This directly substantiates the claim. The page describes it as a current capability with no indication of preview or retirement status.
